vision_profile.current_state: Siddharth is a 26-year-old Frontend Developer with 3 years of experience, proficient in React and TypeScript.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest blocker is a lack of backend development skills, making him dependent on others and limiting his career growth.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to gain backend ownership to qualify for better product company roles and ensure continued salary growth.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can understand core backend concepts, design basic RESTful APIs, and apply object-oriented principles to server-side code.
milestones.identity_statement: You are laying the groundwork for your full-stack journey, mastering the essential building blocks of server-side development.

video.title: Understanding HTTP: The Backbone of the Web
Designing Clean RESTful Interfaces
Exploring Common Backend Architectural Patterns

science.desc: You're debugging a simple API endpoint that's returning a 404. Analyze the request and server logs to identify the issue.

video.title: Crafting Intuitive and Consistent API Endpoints

scenario.title: Designing an API for a Simple Resource

video.title: Ensuring Data Integrity: Validation and Sanitization
Graceful Error Handling in RESTful APIs

science.desc: Describe how you would design a RESTful API for a simple e-commerce product catalog, including endpoints and data structures.

video.title: Mastering OOP for Robust Backend Systems
Applying SOLID Principles for Maintainable Code
Introduction to Common Design Patterns

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can build functional RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js, handling routing, middleware, and asynchronous operations effectively.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now a budding Node.js developer, bringing your API designs to life with practical backend implementation.

video.title: Deep Dive into Node.js Core Concepts
Mastering Callbacks, Promises, and Async/Await
Efficient Dependency Management with npm

science.desc: You're building a Node.js script that reads from multiple files asynchronously. How would you ensure all file operations complete before processing the combined data?

video.title: Setting Up Routes in Express.js
Leveraging Middleware for Request Processing
Building RESTful Endpoints with Express.js

scenario.title: Creating a CRUD API for Users

science.desc: Explain the concept of middleware in Express.js and provide an example of how you would use it to log incoming requests.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can design relational database schemas, write SQL queries, and interact with databases using ORMs like Prisma or Sequelize in your Node.js applications.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming the architect of data, skillfully managing information flow and persistence for your applications.

video.title: Getting Started with SQL and Relational Databases

scenario.title: Designing a Database Schema for a Blog

video.title: Principles of Effective Database Schema Design
Introduction to PostgreSQL: Your First Database

science.desc: You need to design a database schema for a social media application. How would you model users, posts, comments, and likes, ensuring data integrity and efficient querying?

video.title: Understanding Object-Relational Mappers (ORMs)

scenario.title: Choosing Between Raw SQL and ORM

video.title: Getting Started with Prisma: Your Modern ORM
Designing a Clean Data Access Layer

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can implement secure user authentication (JWT, OAuth) and authorization (RBAC) mechanisms for your backend applications, protecting sensitive data and resources.
milestones.identity_statement: You are the guardian of access, building secure gateways and ensuring only the right users see the right data.

video.title: Implementing JWT for Secure API Authentication
Introduction to OAuth 2.0 for Third-Party Integrations
Best Practices for Password Storage and Security

science.desc: Compare and contrast session-based authentication with token-based (JWT) authentication. When would you choose one over the other?

video.title: Implementing Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
Securing API Endpoints with Authorization Logic
Essential Security Practices for Backend Developers

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can containerize your Node.js applications with Docker, understand basic CI/CD pipelines, and deploy your services to cloud platforms.
milestones.identity_statement: You are the orchestrator of your applications, deploying them seamlessly from development to production.

video.title: Getting Started with Docker: Containers for Everyone
Orchestrating Multi-Container Apps with Docker Compose

scenario.title: Setting Up a Dev Environment with Docker Compose

video.title: Packaging Your Node.js Application with Docker

science.desc: Your Node.js application runs perfectly locally but fails to start in a Docker container. What steps would you take to diagnose and fix the issue?

modules.title: CI/CD & Cloud Deployment
lessons: Deploying to Cloud Platforms (e.g., Vercel/Render for Node.js)

video.title: Introduction to Continuous Integration and Deployment
Deploying Your Applications to the Cloud
Advanced Git Techniques for Collaborative Development

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can design and implement scalable backend systems using microservices, message queues, and advanced caching strategies to optimize performance.
milestones.identity_statement: You are evolving into a systems architect, building resilient and high-performing backends that stand the test of scale.

video.title: Introduction to Microservices: Breaking Down Monoliths
Navigating the Complexities of Distributed Systems

scenario.title: Ensuring Data Consistency in a Distributed System

video.title: Asynchronous Communication with Message Queues

scenario.title: Implementing a Task Queue with RabbitMQ

science.desc: You are tasked with migrating a monolithic e-commerce application to a microservices architecture. Outline the key considerations and challenges you would anticipate.

video.title: Boosting Performance with Effective Caching Strategies

scenario.title: Choosing a Caching Strategy for a High-Traffic API

video.title: Implementing Caching with Redis in Node.js
Advanced Techniques for Backend Performance Tuning

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You can seamlessly integrate frontend and backend applications, implement real-time communication, and confidently build and deploy a complete, production-ready full-stack project.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now a complete Full Stack Engineer, capable of building and owning entire applications from end to end.

video.title: Seamlessly Connecting React with Node.js APIs
Real-time Communication with WebSockets

scenario.title: Implementing a Chat Feature with WebSockets

video.title: Ensuring Application Quality with End-to-End Tests

scenario.title: Writing E2E Tests for a Login Flow

science.desc: Your React frontend is failing to fetch data from your Node.js backend with a CORS error. What are the common causes and how would you resolve it?

modules.title: Full Stack Project & Best Practices
lessons: Building a Production-Ready Full Stack Application
Interview Preparation for Full Stack Roles

video.title: Planning and Executing Your First Full Stack Project

scenario.title: Scoping a New Full Stack Feature

video.title: Implementing Robust Logging and Monitoring for Production

scenario.title: Setting Up Alerting for Critical Errors

video.title: Acing Your Full Stack Engineer Interviews

scenario.title: Mock Interview: Full Stack System Design

science.desc: Describe a full-stack project you've worked on (or would like to work on). Walk through its architecture, key technologies, and any challenges you faced/expect to face.
